title: Schema for CodeTour tour files (greglamb/gcodetour fork)

title.description: Specifies the title of the code tour.

description.description: Specifies an optional description for the code tour.

ref.description: Indicates the git ref (branch/commit/tag) that this tour associates with.

isPrimary.description: Specifies whether the tour represents the primary tour for this codebase.

steps.description: Specifies the list of steps that are included in the code tour.

file.description: File path (relative to the workspace root) that the step is associated with.

directory.description: Directory path (relative to the workspace root) that the step is associated with.

anyOf.description: The view ID that this step is associated with.
The view ID that this step is associated with.

uri.description: Absolute URI that is associated with the step.

contents.description: Inline file contents to display for the step, instead of referencing a file or URI on disk. (Fork-only.)

line.description: Line number that the step is associated with.

pattern.description: A regular expression to associate the step with. Only considered when the line property isn't set; associates by line content rather than ordinal.

title.description: An optional title for the step.

icon.description: An optional icon for the step in the CodeTour tree (workspace-relative path, URL, or data URI). (Fork-only.)

markerTitle.description: Derived/read-only: computed by the player from a step's marker comment and stripped on save. Do not author by hand.

selection.description: Text selection that's associated with the step.

commands.description: Command URIs executed when this step is navigated to.

diagram.description: Associates the step with a diagram (an SVG rendered from PlantUML/C4) shown beside the editor and highlighted in sync with the tour. (Fork-only.)

path.description: Workspace-relative path to the SVG to display (e.g. .tours/diagrams/flow.svg).

element.description: Alias of the element to highlight. Must match an element tagged with a 'ct://el/<alias>' hyperlink in the diagram source. Omit to show the diagram unhighlighted.

callout.description: Optional short, one-line label pinned near the highlighted element.

stepMarker.description: The 'marker' string that indicates a line of code represents a step for this tour.

nextTour.description: The title of the tour that is meant to follow this tour.

when.description: A JavaScript expression that must evaluate true for this tour to be shown.
